label: Job giver AI fight base
description: Base combat job giver that acquires and engages enemy targets. Covers AIDefendPoint, AIDefendSelf, AIDefendEscortee, AIFightEnemies, and HiveDefense. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

targetAcquireRadius.label: Target acquire radius
targetAcquireRadius.description: Search radius in cells within which the pawn looks for hostile targets.

targetKeepRadius.label: Target keep radius
targetKeepRadius.description: Maximum distance in cells the pawn is willing to chase a target it has already engaged.

needLOSToAcquireNonPawnTargets.label: Need LOS to acquire non-pawn targets
needLOSToAcquireNonPawnTargets.description: If true, the pawn requires line of sight to acquire non-pawn hostile targets (buildings, turrets).

chaseTarget.label: Chase target
chaseTarget.description: If true, the pawn pursues fleeing targets beyond sight range rather than dropping them.

allowTurrets.label: Allow turrets
allowTurrets.description: If true, the pawn may man turrets to fight enemies in addition to direct combat.

ignoreNonCombatants.label: Ignore non-combatants
ignoreNonCombatants.description: If true, non-combatant pawns are excluded from target consideration.

humanlikesOnly.label: Humanlikes only
humanlikesOnly.description: If true, only humanlike pawns are valid combat targets.
